title: Remove fallback value from secret env lookup
prompt:
This runtime config has a secret with a `||` fallback — if `WEBHOOK_SECRET` is unset, the app silently ships a hardcoded dev value:

```elixir
import Config
config :my_app, :webhook_secret, System.get_env("WEBHOOK_SECRET") || "dev-webhook-secret"
```

Rewrite it so the secret is fetched via `System.fetch_env!/1` (which raises on missing env), removing the `||` fallback entirely. No hardcoded value should remain. If the env is required only in prod, gate the fetch behind `if config_env() == :prod`. Write the fix to `config/runtime.exs`.
tier_rationale: Medium — requires catching that the fallback IS the hardcoded secret.
